name: ${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}-codex
postCreateCommand: sudo npm install -g @openai/codex && bash -c '[ -f pyproject.toml ] && uv sync; [ -f package.json ] && npm install; true'
postStartCommand: sudo mkdir -p /home/dev/.codex && sudo chown -R dev:dev /home/dev/.codex && chmod -R u+rwX /home/dev/.codex && if [ ! -f /home/dev/.codex/config.toml ]; then printf 'sandbox_mode = "danger-full-access"\napproval_policy = "on-request"\n' > /home/dev/.codex/config.toml; fi
